calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Roger Gross for Allan Baird.

Mr. Gross stated that he received a call from an Attorney indicating that he is not representing Mr. Leonis. There being no opposition and nobody present to object, the Court granted the petition for Spousal Property (order signed in open Court).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2017 Continued To Jan-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Continued To Jan-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vincent Yu for (deceased son) Theodore Leonis.

This matter was originally pre-granted.
Mr. Yu stated that he is orally objecting on behalf of deceased son Theodore Leonis. The Court stated that it will continue the matter for written objections to be filed. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to January 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
